message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram labelStyle "C"

class Metric {
    resultCompare()
    sendNotification()
}

class DataSet {
    value
    date
    dataSetType

    getValue()
    getDate()
    getDataSetType()

    return
    return date to compare
    and info about metric type
}

class ResultCompare {
    currentValue
    previousValue
    dataSetType

    CmpMethods()
    return
    (-1;0;1)
}

class Notification {
    sendTo
    message

    sendMethod()
    return
    send message
}

class SendMethod {
    sendMethod()
    return
    send method
}

class CmpMethods {
    cmpMethod()
    return
    select method
}

Metric --> ResultCompare
Metric --> Notification
DataSet --> ResultCompare
ResultCompare --> CmpMethods
Notification --> SendMethod
SendMethod --> CmpMethods

@enduml
